description: Run AI design reviews and query the review service status so other Tutti apps and agents can reuse design critique as a capability.

commands.summary: Review a design and return structured scores
commands.description: Run a six-dimension AI design review on a website URL or a local image file and return a structured JSON report (overall score, per-dimension scores, and a prioritized fix list). Provide either url or image-path.

url.description: Website URL to review. Provide either url or image-path.

image-path.description: Absolute path to a local screenshot/design image to review. Provide either url or image-path.

strictness.description: Scoring strictness: relaxed | standard | strict (default standard). Chinese 宽松 | 标准 | 严苛 are also accepted.

locale.description: Output language for the report, e.g. zh-CN or en. Defaults to zh-CN.

provider.description: Optional local agent provider override, e.g. claude or codex.

model.description: Optional model override for the selected provider.

commands.description: List previously saved design reviews (most recent first) so callers can browse review history. Each entry includes id, source, overall score, status, and timestamps. Use the id with the export command to retrieve the full report.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of reviews to return (most recent first). Must be a positive integer.

commands.description: Export a saved design review as Markdown or JSON. Provide the review id (from the history command) and an optional format (md | json, default md). Returns the filename and the rendered content.

id.description: Id of the saved review to export (from the history command).

commands.description: Return the app id, version, configured agent provider and its availability, so callers can discover the capability and check readiness before invoking review.
